eng.definition: in a state or period of inactivity or dormancy.
examples: The volcano has been quiescent for decades.
The city streets were quiescent in the early morning hours.
The disease is quiescent, but it is not completely gone.

hin.definition: Respect or admiration for someone or something
examples: मुझे उसके प्रति बहुत सम्मान है.
हमें सभी का सम्मान करना चाहिए.
यह मेरे लिए बड़ा सम्मान है.
